case_title: ANDREA BRONNER et al VS. KAREN A SAYLOR

docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING, DENIED, NOTICE SENT TO ALL PARTIES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-15-2008 - CONTINUED TO JAN-06-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES ARE PRESENT, HOWEVER THE DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. CONTINUED FOR COMMISSIONER SLAVIT TO HEAR CASE. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-20-2008 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO DEC-15-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. PLAINTIFF TO PROPERLY SERVE THE DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: RUSSELL DAVIS. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM RUSSELL DAVIS DAVIS FILED BY BRONNER, ANDREA BUERKLE, CHARLOTTE
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT SAYLOR, KAREN A
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY BRONNER, ANDREA BUERKLE, CHARLOTTE AS TO DEFENDANT SAYLOR, KAREN A ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-20-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-06-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO SERVICE. PLAINTIFF MAY RESET CASE AND EFFECT SERVICE OF CLAIM ON DEFENDANT. ONCE SERVICE IS COMPLETED, PLAINTIFFS MAY REQUEST TO APPEAR AT TRIAL BY TELEPHONE, OR SUBMIT WRITTEN DECLARATIONS IN LIEU OF PERSONAL APPEARANCE AT TRIAL. PLAINTIFFS MAY WISH TO CONTACT THE COURT ACCESS CENTER FOR INFORMATION CONCERNING SERVICE OF THEIR CLAIM. (ACCESS@STATE.ORG). DEFENDANT KAREN A. SAYLOR PRESENT. PLAINITFFS ARE NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
